summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Steel Microstructure Prediction Framework v2. Backend API shows 94.4% success rate with all physics constraints working correctly. Frontend UI fully functional with all required components.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 500 Internal Server Error due to schema mismatch
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Clear old predictions or migrate database schema

integration_issues.issue: History not loading due to backend API 500 error

passed_tests: POST /api/predict with normalizing returns all mechanical properties (YS, TS, HV, El)
POST /api/predict with annealing and cooling_rate > 1 returns 400 error
POST /api/predict with quenching and cooling_rate < 50 returns 400 error
Frontend form shows Manganese and Silicon sliders
Frontend validates cooling rate changes when heat treatment changes
Mechanical properties display in results (Yield, Tensile, Hardness, Elongation)
Phase charts show radar chart for mechanical profile
Physics constraints properly enforced (C-Mn relationship, cooling rates)
API status and regime info endpoints working
Input validation working for invalid parameters
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix prediction history API by migrating old database records to include new mechanical properties fields (manganese_content, silicon_content, initial_grain_size, martensite_fraction, yield_strength, tensile_strength, hardness, elongation). Consider adding database migration script or clearing old predictions.
